goal: New employee onboarding workflow
description: Automate the process of onboarding a new hire: register in HR system, set up attendance tracking, and notify the team.

steps.action: Create employee record with personal info, department, and start date
steps.error_hint: Check if employee email already exists in SmartHR. Note: SmartHR is API-only, use REST API at developer.smarthr.jp

steps.action: Register employee for attendance tracking and assign default shift pattern
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME is API-only. Ensure employee ID format matches SmartHR export

steps.action: Send welcome message to team room and create introduction task
steps.error_hint: Verify bot has permission to post in the target room

goal: Invoice creation and accounting sync
description: Create an invoice for a client and sync the transaction to the accounting system.

steps.action: Create invoice with line items, tax calculation, and payment terms
steps.error_hint: Ensure tax rate matches current Japanese consumption tax (10% standard, 8% reduced)

steps.action: Record the receivable entry in the accounting ledger
steps.error_hint: Check fiscal year period is still open before posting

goal: Customer follow-up after meeting
description: After a business meeting, look up the contact, send a follow-up message, and create a follow-up task.

steps.action: Look up contact by name or company to get email and meeting history
steps.error_hint: If multiple matches, prefer the most recently scanned business card

steps.action: Send internal follow-up note to the sales team room
steps.error_hint: Keep message under 5000 characters (Chatwork limit)

steps.action: Create a follow-up task with deadline and assign to account owner
steps.error_hint: Ensure assignee has access to the sales project

goal: E-commerce order notification to team
description: When a new order comes in, fetch order details and notify the fulfillment team.

steps.action: Get latest order details including items, customer info, and shipping address
steps.error_hint: Order may be in 'pending' status if payment not yet confirmed. BASE is API-only.

steps.action: Send order notification to fulfillment group with item list and shipping info
steps.error_hint: LINE WORKS is API-only. Use Bot API v2. Check bot is added to the fulfillment group.

goal: Weekly project status report
description: Collect project metrics from the PM tool and share a summary with the team.

steps.action: Get sprint summary: open issues, completed this week, blockers, burndown
steps.error_hint: Ensure milestone/sprint is set correctly for the current iteration

steps.action: Post formatted status report to the project room
steps.error_hint: Use [info] tags for Chatwork rich formatting

goal: Contract signing to accounting entry
description: After a contract is signed electronically, record it in the accounting system and notify the team.

steps.action: Get signed contract details (amount, parties, effective date)
steps.error_hint: CloudSign is API-only. Check document status is 'completed' before proceeding.

steps.action: Create sales journal entry with contract amount and revenue recognition date
steps.error_hint: Match revenue recognition to contract effective date, not signing date

steps.action: Post contract closure notification to #sales channel
steps.error_hint: Format amount with Japanese yen symbol and thousands separator

goal: E-commerce sales to accounting automation
description: Sync Shopify orders to freee accounting. Auto-create journal entries for each sale with proper consumption tax handling.

steps.action: Get recent orders with line items, tax, shipping, and payment status
steps.error_hint: Filter by financial_status=paid to avoid recording unpaid orders

steps.action: Create journal entries for each order (sales revenue + consumption tax)
steps.error_hint: Apply 8% reduced rate for food items, 10% standard for others. Check インボイス制度 compliance.

steps.action: Post daily sales summary to accounting team room

input_mapping.message: Daily sales: ¥{{total_revenue}}, {{order_count}} orders synced to freee

steps.error_hint: Include order count and any sync errors in the summary

goal: Talent review and evaluation workflow
description: Pull employee data from HR system, review skills and performance, and update talent management platform.

steps.action: Get employee list with department, tenure, and position data
steps.error_hint: SmartHR is API-only. Use v2 endpoint. Filter by active employees only.

steps.action: Update skill matrix and performance evaluation scores
steps.error_hint: Kaonavi is API-only. Use API v2. Match employee IDs between SmartHR and Kaonavi.

steps.action: Create talent review summary page in the HR workspace
steps.error_hint: Ensure Notion integration has access to the HR workspace database

goal: Monthly attendance to payroll processing
description: Collect monthly attendance data, calculate overtime, and sync to payroll system for salary processing.

steps.action: Export monthly attendance summary (work hours, overtime, leave days) for all employees
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME is API-only. Verify all employees have clocked out before export. Check for unapproved leave requests.

steps.action: Import attendance data into freee payroll and calculate salary
steps.error_hint: Verify overtime calculation matches Japanese labor law: 25% premium for regular overtime, 50% for late night (22:00-5:00)

steps.action: Notify HR manager that payroll is ready for review

input_mapping.message: Payroll for {{target_month}} ready: ¥{{total_payroll}}. Please review and approve.

steps.error_hint: Tag the HR manager directly for approval

goal: Customer request to development task
description: When a customer request is registered in kintone, automatically create a development task in Backlog and notify the dev team.

steps.action: Get new customer request record with priority, description, and requester info
steps.error_hint: Map kintone priority field values to Backlog priority levels

steps.action: Create issue in the development project with mapped priority and description
steps.error_hint: Include kintone record URL in the Backlog issue description for traceability

steps.action: Notify dev team about new customer request with Backlog issue link
steps.error_hint: Include Backlog issue URL for quick access

goal: Year-end tax adjustment workflow (年末調整)
description: Collect employee documents, process year-end adjustment calculations, and submit to tax office.

steps.action: Collect employee year-end adjustment documents (扶養控除申告書, 保険料控除申告書)
steps.error_hint: SmartHR is API-only. Send reminder to employees with missing documents before deadline (typically mid-November).

steps.action: Calculate year-end adjustment (withholding tax reconciliation) for each employee
steps.error_hint: Verify housing loan deduction (住宅ローン控除) amounts. First year requires tax office submission, second year onwards through employer.

steps.action: Send year-end adjustment completion report to HR team

input_mapping.message: 年末調整 {{tax_year}} complete. {{employee_count}} processed. Total refund: ¥{{total_refund}}

steps.error_hint: Include count of employees with additional tax due vs refund

goal: Low inventory alert and reorder notification
description: Monitor Shopify inventory levels and alert the purchasing team when stock is low.

steps.action: Check inventory levels for all products, identify items below reorder threshold
steps.error_hint: Check inventory across all locations if multi-warehouse

steps.action: Create reorder request records in the purchasing app
steps.error_hint: Include supplier info and last purchase price from kintone master data

steps.action: Send LINE notification to purchasing manager about low stock items

input_mapping.message: Low stock alert: {{count}} items need reorder

steps.error_hint: Use flex message for rich formatting with product images

goal: kintone status change to Chatwork notification
description: When a record status changes in kintone (e.g., approval, completion), automatically notify the relevant Chatwork room. Most common integration pattern in Japanese companies.

steps.action: Detect record status change and get record details (title, assignee, new status)
steps.error_hint: Use kintone webhook or process management API. Ensure the status field name matches your app's field code.

steps.action: Post status change notification to the project room
steps.error_hint: Use Chatwork [info] tags for visual formatting. Include record URL for one-click access.

goal: kintone task assignment to Slack notification
description: When a task is assigned in kintone, send a Slack DM or channel notification to the assignee. Ensures no task goes unnoticed.

steps.action: Get newly assigned task record with assignee, deadline, and priority
steps.error_hint: Map kintone user field to Slack user via email address lookup

steps.action: Send task assignment notification via DM to assignee
steps.error_hint: Use Slack users.lookupByEmail to resolve email to Slack user ID before sending DM

goal: kintone client master to freee accounting sync
description: When a new client is registered in kintone CRM, automatically create the corresponding trading partner in freee. Eliminates double-entry between sales and accounting.

steps.action: Get new client record (company name, address, contact person, payment terms)
steps.error_hint: Only sync clients with status 'approved' to avoid creating incomplete records in freee

steps.action: Create trading partner (取引先) in freee with matched payment terms
steps.error_hint: Check for existing partner with same name to avoid duplicates. Map kintone payment terms to freee's payment term codes.

steps.action: Update the client record with the freee partner ID for future reference
steps.error_hint: Add a 'freee連携済み' status flag to prevent duplicate syncs

goal: kintone daily attendance data from KING OF TIME
description: Import daily attendance data from KING OF TIME into a kintone app for managers to review alongside project data. Common pattern for companies using kintone as operations hub.

steps.action: Get daily attendance records (clock-in/out, overtime, breaks) for all employees
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME is API-only. Check for employees who forgot to clock out (open records).

steps.action: Upsert attendance records into the daily attendance kintone app
steps.error_hint: Use bulk update API for efficiency. Match on employee_id + date as unique key.

steps.action: Alert HR about attendance anomalies (missing clock-out, excessive overtime)

input_mapping.message: Attendance alert: {{anomaly_count}} issues detected today. Check kintone app.

steps.error_hint: Only send notification if anomalies exist. Include direct link to kintone filtered view.

goal: SmartHR new hire data to kintone onboarding app
description: When a new employee is registered in SmartHR, automatically create onboarding task records in kintone with checklist items (PC setup, account creation, orientation schedule).

steps.action: Get new employee details (name, department, start date, position)
steps.error_hint: SmartHR is API-only. Filter by employment status '入社予定' (scheduled to join).

steps.action: Create onboarding checklist record from template with department-specific tasks
steps.error_hint: Use kintone app template records for department-specific checklists (IT setup varies by department)

steps.action: Notify department manager and IT team about upcoming new hire

input_mapping.message: New hire: {{employee_name}} joining {{department}} on {{start_date}}. Onboarding checklist: {{checklist_url}}

steps.error_hint: Tag the department manager and #it-support for PC preparation

goal: kintone customer data to HubSpot CRM sync
description: Sync customer contact information from kintone to HubSpot for marketing automation. Enables sales data in kintone to feed into HubSpot email sequences and deal tracking.

steps.action: Get recently updated customer records with contact details and deal stage
steps.error_hint: Use kintone's updated_time query to get only changed records since last sync

steps.action: Upsert contacts in HubSpot with mapped properties (company, deal stage, source)
steps.error_hint: Use HubSpot batch API for efficiency. Map kintone field codes to HubSpot property names in config.

steps.action: Post sync summary to sales ops room

input_mapping.message: CRM Sync: {{synced_count}} contacts synced kintone→HubSpot. Errors: {{error_count}}

steps.error_hint: Only notify if errors > 0, otherwise use daily summary

goal: Stripe payment to freee automatic journal entry
description: When a Stripe payment succeeds, automatically create an income journal entry in freee. Common pattern for SaaS companies and online businesses in Japan.

steps.action: Get successful payment details (amount, customer, description, fees)
steps.error_hint: Convert Stripe amount from cents to yen (JPY is zero-decimal currency, no conversion needed). Include Stripe fee as separate expense line.

steps.action: Create compound journal entry: revenue + Stripe fee expense + net receivable
steps.error_hint: Record Stripe processing fee (3.6%) as 支払手数料. Net amount = payment - fee.

steps.action: Post payment notification to #revenue channel
steps.error_hint: Format with ¥ and thousands separator for readability

goal: Shopify order to Yamato shipping label
description: When a Shopify order is placed, automatically create a Yamato B2 Cloud shipping label and update the order with tracking number. Essential for Japanese e-commerce operations.

steps.action: Get new unfulfilled orders with shipping address details
steps.error_hint: Japanese addresses: use address1 for 都道府県+市区町村, address2 for 番地+建物名. zip format: 123-4567

steps.action: Create shipping label with recipient address and package details
steps.error_hint: ヤマト B2: delivery time slots are Japanese standard: 午前中/14-16/16-18/18-20/19-21. Specify お届け希望時間帯.

steps.action: Update order with tracking number and mark as fulfilled
steps.error_hint: Shopify automatically sends tracking email to customer on fulfillment

goal: Zendesk support ticket escalation to HubSpot deal
description: When a Zendesk ticket reveals an upsell opportunity (e.g., customer asks about features on higher plan), create a deal in HubSpot and notify the account owner.

steps.action: Get ticket details with customer info and conversation history
steps.error_hint: Zendesk requester may not have organization set — fall back to email domain for company identification

steps.action: Find or create contact, then create deal in upsell pipeline
steps.error_hint: Use HubSpot search API to find existing contact by email before creating a new one (avoid duplicates)

steps.action: Notify account owner about upsell opportunity with ticket context
steps.error_hint: Tag the deal owner with @mention using their Slack user ID

goal: Square POS daily sales to freee journal entry
description: At end of day, aggregate Square POS sales and create a daily revenue journal entry in freee. Common pattern for retail shops and restaurants in Japan.

steps.action: Get today's payment transactions aggregated by payment method
steps.error_hint: Square amounts are in JPY (integer). Separate cash vs card vs QR (PayPay, etc.) for accurate accounting

steps.action: Create compound journal entry with split by payment method
steps.error_hint: Card payments: debit 売掛金 (accounts receivable). Cash: debit 現金. QR payments (PayPay etc.): debit 売掛金 with sub-account.

steps.action: Post daily sales summary to store management room

input_mapping.message:
[info][title]本日の売上[/title]合計: ¥{{total_sales}} ({{transaction_count}}件)
現金: ¥{{cash}} / カード: ¥{{card}} / QR: ¥{{qr}}[/info]

steps.error_hint: Use Chatwork [info] tags for formatted summary. Include comparison with yesterday if available.

goal: RESERVA booking to LINE notification
description: When a new reservation is made on RESERVA, send a confirmation message to the customer via LINE and notify staff via Chatwork. Common for clinics, salons, and fitness studios.

steps.action: Get new booking details (customer, date/time, service, staff)
steps.error_hint: RESERVA webhook or polling. Customer LINE ID must be linked in advance via RESERVA's LINE連携 feature.

steps.action: Send booking confirmation Flex Message to customer
steps.error_hint: Use Flex Message for rich confirmation card (date, time, service, cancel link). Reply messages are free; push messages count against quota.

steps.action: Notify staff room about new booking
steps.error_hint: Tag the assigned staff member with [To:account_id]. Include direct link to RESERVA admin for easy management.

goal: kintone deal close to SMS thank-you via Twilio
description: When a deal is closed-won in kintone, send a personalized thank-you SMS to the customer via Twilio and log the activity. Japanese business courtesy automation.

steps.action: Get closed-won deal details with customer phone number
steps.error_hint: Japanese phone numbers: mobile starts with 070/080/090. Format as +81XXXXXXXXX (drop leading 0).

steps.action: Send personalized thank-you SMS

input_mapping.body: {{customer_name}}様、この度はご契約ありがとうございます。今後ともよろしくお願いいたします。

steps.error_hint: Twilio JP: use +81 format. Japanese SMS has 670 char limit (Shift_JIS). Keep under 70 chars for single segment.

steps.action: Update deal record with SMS sent timestamp
steps.error_hint: Mark as sent to prevent duplicate SMS. Use kintone's revision field for optimistic concurrency.

goal: CloudSign signed contract to Box archive
description: When a contract is signed in CloudSign, download the signed PDF and archive it in the correct Box folder organized by client and year. Automated contract management.

steps.action: Get newly signed contract document with PDF
steps.error_hint: CloudSign returns signed PDF via /documents/{id}/files. Download within 30 days of signing.

steps.action: Upload signed PDF to client folder organized by year
steps.error_hint: Create folder if not exists. Box folder names: use client company name (株式会社 prefix is common in Japan).

steps.action: Notify legal team about archived contract
steps.error_hint: Include Box shared link for quick access. Set link expiry per company policy.

steps.action: Create envelope with invoice PDF and set signer email

steps.action: Update invoice status to 'sent' and attach CloudSign envelope reference

steps.action: Create journal entries for salary expense, social insurance, and withholding tax

steps.action: Notify finance team that payroll journals have been posted

steps.action: Update opportunity with freee invoice ID in custom field

steps.action: Assign lead owner based on region routing rules

steps.action: Report campaign launch status to marketing channel
steps.error_hint: Include campaign_id in notification for easy tracking

steps.action: Create revenue journal entry with payment reference and tax breakdown
